/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libwebcore.a CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/dom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/render_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/paint_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/js_dom_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/css_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/layout_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/browser_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/event_target.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/scrollbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/resource_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/script_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/context_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/gl_render_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/script_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/js_realm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/gc_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/sdl_gl_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/webgl_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/simple_font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/shortcut_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/webgl_bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/sidebar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/svg_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/navigation_history.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_dialog_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_anchor_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_div_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_span_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_image_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_form_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_input_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_button_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_media_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/html/html_canvas_element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/browser/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/browser/navigator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/browser/location.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/css/css_style_sheet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/css/css_style_declaration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/css/css_rule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/css/css_selector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/css/css_computed_style.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/css/css_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/compositor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webcore.dir/src/page_renderer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libwebcore.a
